appointmentResultsJson.title: Appointment Results JSON
appointmentResultsJson.description: JSON array returned by GET_APPOINTMENTS. Each entry contains serviceAppointmentId, appointmentNumber, startTime, endTime, and doctorName. Parse this to present appointment options to the patient and to extract serviceAppointmentId for cancel or reschedule.

isSuccess.title: Success
isSuccess.description: Boolean indicating whether the operation succeeded. If false, relay the message to the patient.

message.title: Message
message.description: Confirmation or error detail. Surface this to the patient in all cases.

serviceAppointmentId.title: Service Appointment Id
serviceAppointmentId.description: Returned on successful BOOK_APPOINTMENT or RESCHEDULE_APPOINTMENT. Store for reference.
